title: Recommendations
description: Prioritised recommendations triggered by dimension score bands and context answers. Grouped by horizon, sorted by priority.

dimension.description: The primary dimension this recommendation addresses. Use cross_cutting for recommendations that span multiple dimensions.

trigger.description: Score conditions that activate this recommendation.

minLevel.description: Recommendation fires when the dimension score is >= this value.

maxLevel.description: Recommendation fires when the dimension score is <= this value.

context.description: Optional context conditions that further filter when this recommendation fires.

anyOf.description: Fires if context.sector matches any of these values.

cloud.description: Fires if context.cloud_posture matches any of these values.

budget.description: Fires if context.budget_posture matches any of these values.

excludeIf.description: Suppresses this recommendation if the given context key matches the given value.

effort.description: Relative implementation effort: S = days, M = weeks, L = months.

primary_tool.description: ID of the primary recommended tool from tools-catalogue.json.

alternative_tools.description: IDs of alternative tools, in preference order.

rationale.description: Why this recommendation matters at this maturity level. Should be honest and specific, not generic.

first_steps.description: Concrete, actionable first steps — not vague advice.
